description_long: This juice bar is a compact, kiosk-style structure with a partially open front, featuring a wooden counter and a corrugated metal base. The bar is equipped with five metal stools for seating, and the counter displays two large beverage dispensers and a small potted plant. Behind the counter, there are shelves with containers and a central digital screen, flanked by signage and menu boards. The structure is topped with a wooden pergola-style roof and enclosed on three sides by tall, plain white walls. The overall design is functional and inviting, with a blend of industrial and rustic elements. The front-facing area is clearly designed for customer interaction and service.
description: A compact, kiosk-style juice bar with a wooden counter, metal stools, and a pergola roof, featuring prominent signage and a digital menu board.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main counter, seating, beverage dispensers, digital screen, shelves, and signage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter, arrangement of stools, and partial view of the back shelving and equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tall, plain white back wall with minimal detail and no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the enclosed structure, counter depth, and partial interior layout.
attribute_signage: There is a prominent black sign with white text reading 'Caffè D'arte' above the counter, flanked by two additional rectangular signs with graphics and text, all mounted on the back wall. The signage is clear, modern, and visually central.
attribute_menu_board: A digital screen is centrally mounted on the back wall above the counter, likely serving as a menu board. It is rectangular, black, and visually integrated with the shelving.
attribute_blender_equipment: Two large beverage dispensers are visible on the counter, but no traditional blender or juicing equipment is clearly seen.
attribute_architectural_style: Industrial-rustic, characterized by a mix of wood and metal materials, exposed shelving, a pergola-style roof, and minimalist white walls.
